sections.paragraph:
with suff. יִקְבֶךָ (without dagesh lene), Deu 15:14 16:13 pl. const. יִקְבֵי Zec 14:10, m.

(1) the vat of the wine press, ὑπολήνιον, the reservoir into which the must squeezed out in the press (גַּת) flows, Joe 2:24 Pro 3:10. It was commonly dug into the earth, or else cut out in the rock.

(2) the wine press itself, Job 24:11 2Ki 6:27.
